## 📊 Priority & Scope

- **Priority:** [ ] P0 (Critical) [ ] P1 (High) [ ] P2 (Medium) [ ] P3 (Low)
- **Estimated Effort:** [ ] S (Small) [ ] M (Medium) [ ] L (Large) [ ] XL (Extra Large)
- **Impacts:**
  - [ ] Web UI
  - [ ] Discord Bot
  - [ ] API
  - [ ] Database
  - [ ] AI Agent

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with project goals
- [ ] I've provided a clear use case
- [ ] I've suggested a solution
